title: Stop, Look, and Hold Hands
lesson: Stop, look both ways, and hold a grown-up's hand to cross the road safely.
prompts: On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks along the pavement, with a cheerful expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} walks beside them. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is at the edge of the kerb, leaning forward as if about to step toward the road, with a surprised expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} gently holds them back with a caring, watchful look. A parked car waits nearby. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands at the kerb, with an attentive expression, turning their head to look both ways along the road. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} points left and right, teaching them to look. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands at the crossing, holding the grown-up's hand and waiting beside a traffic light showing a red figure, with a patient expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} waits calmly, holding their hand. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks across the white zebra crossing, with a confident smile, holding hands with {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} who walks beside them. A green walking signal glows ahead. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, safely on the far pavement the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, giving a happy thumbs-up, with a proud smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} gives a thumbs-up and a warm smile. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a city street with a pedestrian crossing in daylight, the child walks along the pavement, cheerful, while the father walks beside them.
At the kerb, the child leans forward as if about to step into the road with a surprised look while the father gently holds them back, caring and watchful, a parked car nearby — stop first.
At the kerb, the child turns their head to look both ways along the road, attentive, while the father points left and right, teaching them to look.
At the crossing by a traffic light showing red, the child waits patiently holding the father's hand while the father waits calmly holding their hand — waiting for the signal.
The child walks across the white zebra crossing, confident, holding hands with the father, a green walking signal glowing ahead — crossing safely together.
Safely on the far pavement, the child gives a happy thumbs-up, proud, while the father gives a thumbs-up and a warm smile — crossed the road safely.
texts: You walked along the busy pavement with Dad. Up ahead was the road. "Stay close," said Dad.
You started to step toward the road, but Dad gently held you back. "We must stop first," he said.
"Look left, look right," said Dad. You turned your head and looked both ways along the road.
The light showed red, so you waited patiently, holding Dad's hand. Not yet — we wait.
The light turned green. Holding hands, you walked safely across the stripes. Step, step, step.
Safe on the other side! Dad gave you a thumbs-up. "Well done!" You crossed the road safely.
